reviews.title: A 5 star hotel in the middle of nowhere
reviews.text:
Everything is very good except that the hotel is far from everywhere. Definitely nothing is within walking distance.
Do not stay if you do not have own transport.
reviews.response: Dear guest, thank you for sharing about your stay at  Fuzhou Marriott Hotel Riverside. Your comments and suggestions will definitely help us to deliver and improve our service. We are looking forward to welcoming you back in the future.

reviews.title: Review for Ms. Cheryl Zhang - Hotel Front Desk Manager
reviews.text: Ms. Cheryl Zhang provided exceptional service during my stay, helping me book a Didi to my next destination with efficiency and care. Her professionalism and friendly demeanor made my experience truly enjoyable. Thank you, Cheryl!
reviews.response:
Dear guest, thank you for sharing this with us. We are glad to hear that your stay was satisfying and happy. It is with great pleasure that we were able to provide you with a wonderful experience. We look forward to providing another memorable experience for you in the future.
Warm regards.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Breakfast is ok, location is very far from city.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives:
I had a near-death experience at 26/f.   I went up there for a view of the city lights.   The corridors were dark.  I walked towards the glass panel near the lift lobby.  In the dark I did not notice there was a low platform near the glass panel.  I tripped over the platform and fell against the glass.  Luckily the glass was strong enough.  If it broke, I would have flown through glass from 26/f on to the ground.

Hotel needs to do some safety measures about that risk.

reviews.title: Good to stay
reviews.text:
There are nothing around but good hotel as other Marriott.
The gym and pool are also nice for training.

reviews.title: 福州空港に近い
reviews.text: 空港の送り有り、食事も美味しい、一人より2人で泊まるのをお勧めします。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: 展示会場の近く。何もない。

reviews.title: 可以
reviews.response:
1.Dear guest, thank you for sharing this with us. We’re glad to hear that you had a pleasant stay, especially thanks to our sincere hospitality and the arrangement made by our team. We highly appreciate your feedback, as it will help us to improve and do better. We look forward to welcoming you back again in the future.
Warm regards.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: 周りに何もなく、空港へのアクセスもそこまで良くない

reviews.title: 很高級的飯店
reviews.text: 飯店水平高，早餐非常好吃

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 非常乾淨，非常新服務人員超級棒

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
接送機服務很專業
房間設備很完善。
reviews.negatives: 目前的位置有點偏僻，晚上那個區域也沒有燈光。

reviews.title: Nice hotel but terrible terrible breakfast and organization
reviews.positives: Camera grande e comodo, posizione comoda
reviews.negatives: Collazione terribile, the worst ever had in Marriott

reviews.title: Excellent room, spacious, very courteous staff made my stay pleasurable.
reviews.negatives: There is no iron or ironing board in the room...Lucky it was the weekend.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hotel muito bonito, quarto aconchegante e limpo. Cama muito boa ! Café da manhã delicioso  !
reviews.negatives: Tentamos usar a piscina, só que pra usar teria que comprar uma touca de 79 CNY. Achei um absurdo, primeira vez que me hospedei num hotel com essa exigência.
